articles.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
articles.description: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

articles.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
articles.description: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

articles.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
articles.description: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

articles.title: Tokenization's next use case is personalized portfolios, NYLIM executive says
articles.description: Thomas Sy, head of multi-asset solutions at the $800-million asset manager, says blockchain can enable complex portfolio construction that's not yet possible in traditional finance.

articles.title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
articles.description: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

articles.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
articles.description: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

articles.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
articles.description: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.
